Subject: RE: The Florida Science Foundation
Date: Mon, 17 Dec 2007 17:19:19 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com

I have your comments, Darren and need to review with my client, who is
out today.  I would think we could wrap this up in the next day or so.
Tom
